hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(env|env\..*)$' && ! echo "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.env\.example' && echo 'BLOCKED: .env files contain secrets' && exit 1; exit 0
echo "$TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf\s+/|DROP\s+TABLE|DROP\s+DATABASE|push.*--force|push.*-f' && echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive command detected' && exit 1; exit 0
path="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; echo "$path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|md|css)$' && pnpm exec prettier --write "$path" --log-level silent >/dev/null 2>&1; exit 0

path="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; echo "$path" | grep -qE 'app/api/(servers|tools|policies|relationships|openapi-import)/.*\.(ts|tsx)$' || exit 0; grep -qE 'invalidateManifest\(' "$path" 2>/dev/null || echo "REMINDER: $path is a mutation route. Did you call 'await invalidateManifest()' before returning? Without it the manifest cache goes stale and live policy reload breaks."; exit 0

echo "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q TASKS.md || exit 0; section=$(sed -n '/^## Current:/,/^## /p' TASKS.md 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$section" ] && exit 0; unchecked=$(echo "$section" | grep -cF -e '- [ ]' || true); checked=$(echo "$section" | grep -cF -e '- [x]' || true); [ "$unchecked" -eq 0 ] && [ "$checked" -gt 0 ] && echo 'Sprint complete — run /wrap-sprint to harvest learnings into memory/docs, then open the next sprint.'; exit 0
